name: Sausage Run
description: Experience the thrill of survival in Sausage Run! This exciting adventure running game allows you to guide your little sausage to sprint for as long as possible with simple controls. Stay vigilant as danger lurks around every corner. The games difficulty depends entirely on your reaction speed. How durable is your sausage? Want to give it a try? Various fun obstacles will make you love this game! Can you become the champion? Give this game a try! Have fun playing!
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: 3D, Avoid, fly, Girl, jump, Kid, run, Sport
